name: Mystery Box VR: Hidden Secrets Escape

reviews.review_description: Love these types of games so really wanted it to work. Way too glitchy...can't get even the most basic things to work. Save your money...
The room was cool. The game mechanics are par for what the game needs. Just starting out and some are easy but have a few head scratchers.

reviews.review_title: Quite a challenge, this mystery box!
reviews.review_description:
It took me sometimes a quite long time to find how to pass to the next box!
The systems to open it are each other very different. 
A good challenge for the brain !

developer_response.body: Thanks for your feedback, really appreciated!

reviews.review_title: JUST WON THIS EXCITED TO PLAY IT
reviews.review_description: I'll leave a full review when I give it a full playthrough

This is an interesting take on the puzzle box type game. You’re presented with a box. There are 4 sides. One side has the button you push to open the box. In order for that button to work, you have to “solve” the puzzles on the remaining 3 sides. Each puzzle on each puzzle box is quite unique and without using the hint system, it can be rather daunting trying to decipher what needs to be done in order to solve each mini-puzzle. I needed to use hints on MOST of the mini puzzles and in hindsight, they did seem semi-obvious (given the hint). And just when you think you’re going to get the hang of it, the next puzzle box is completely unique or there’s just enough variation that it’s not “simple” to solve. There’s also a secondary type puzzle per se where somewhere on the box, there’s a small raised/hidden tile that you can optionally find. Get them all and you can then do the additional pictogram type puzzle (not sure what else it would be called). Overall, this is an interesting puzzle box game. The only drawback is that it’s the same type of puzzle box repeated. While the variations are different, it would have been nice if maybe there were different shaped boxes, changing environments (with some sort of motion or ambient feeling). That said, it’s a good way to test your puzzle solving abilities.

developer_response.body: Thanks for your feedback, really appreciated!

reviews.review_description: I loved the mystery box on my phone but the vr version is just too glitchy

developer_response.body: Thanks for your feedback, sorry you had trouble playing g this puzzle game, feel free to get in touch at https://xsgames.co, I'll be glad to help ;)
